title: Channel state feedback enhancement in downlink multiuser superposition transmission
abstract: A method of performing downlink multiuser superposition transmission (MUST) with enhanced channel state information (CSI) feedback is proposed. When a user equipment (UE) reports CQI/SINR feedback for RIĂŻÂĽÂťRANK-2, the UE also reports a single beam CQI/SINR feedback for RIĂŻÂĽÂťRANK1. As a result, the scheduling base station can calculate the actual SINRs based on different MUST scenarios and thereby determining appropriate modulation and coding scheme (MCS) for the UE. Furthermore, if the granularity of the CQI table cannot reflect the high values of the single beam SINR, then a predefined scaling factor (0<ĂŽÂ˛<1) known to both the base station and the UE may be applied.
